message:
fix(sync): use writer_queue.is_empty() instead of writer_waiters count for wake decisions

Fix a correctness issue in RwLock's fairness logic where writer_waiters
(a counter) could disagree with writer_queue (the actual deque) after
cancellations or drops. The wake_writer decision now checks the queue
directly in three paths: release_write, WriteFuture::drop, and
OwnedWriteFuture::drop.

This ensures the fairness comparison between writer and reader waiter IDs
only fires when there are actually queued waiters to wake, preventing
potential unwrap() panics on an empty queue when the counter is stale.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
